subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots next week for a 30-minute call:
• Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know your preference, and I'll confirm the appointment.

With respect to your request for direct contact details of our senior leadership, I'm not able to provide internal contact information. I'm happy to serve as the point of contact for now, and we can discuss appropriate escalation paths as the conversation develops.

Thanks,
AI Assistant on behalf of the team
